name: blender-pro
description: Professional Blender workflow plugin for Codex. Bundles expert skills, references, and MCP configuration for scene creation, procedural modeling, materials, lighting, rendering, animation, rigging, Python automation, and quality review.

interface.longDescription: Use Codex as a professional Blender assistant for scene creation, procedural modeling, materials, lighting, rendering, animation, rigging, Python automation, troubleshooting, and final quality review. Includes a bundled Blender MCP configuration and extensive skills/references for disciplined Blender work.
defaultPrompt: Use Blender Pro to connect to my current Blender scene, inspect it, and propose a professional improvement plan before changing anything.
Use Blender Pro to build a clean, named, organized Blender scene with materials, lighting, camera, and render settings.
Use Blender Pro to write safe Blender Python that creates or modifies the scene in small reversible steps and verifies the result.
Use Blender Pro to review my scene for scale, topology, naming, lighting, camera composition, render readiness, and cleanup.
